description: Jacob Creech discusses the latest updates in the Solana ecosystem, including offline signing for Ledger wallets, the upcoming implementation of QUIC, and improvements to the Solana Explorer.
topic_summary: The video covers new features such as offline signing for Ledger wallets [t=18:16], updates on QUIC protocol [t=81:91], and enhancements to the Solana Explorer [t=137:80].
